case_title: ELAINE H MURRAY VS. IRELAND TILE & STONE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,786.42 FILED BY MURRAY, ELAINE H AS TO DEFENDANT IRELAND TILE & STONE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-16-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ELAINE H. MURRAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IRELAND TILE & STONE, INC.
